description: Refund answer is supported but surrounded by irrelevant campus operations chunks.
query: What is the refund deadline for the evening lab course?

retrieved_chunks.text: Students may withdraw from the evening lab course for a full refund within 10 calendar days of enrollment.
Parking permits for the east garage must be renewed by the first Friday of each term.
The student canteen offers extended service hours during the winter examination period.

final_answer: Students may withdraw from the evening lab course for a full refund within 10 calendar days of enrollment.

entries.text: Students may withdraw from the evening lab course for a full refund within 10 calendar days of enrollment.
